response.global_analysis: MC segment featuring Kobo Kanaeru, Kaela Kovalskia, and Vestia Zeta. Spoken language is Indonesian with hardcoded Japanese subtitles. I used the hardcoded subtitles for the 'og' field as they provide the correct transcription/spelling for the intended dialogue. Timing is strictly aligned with the Indonesian vocal audio. No vocal music is present.

subtitles.original: はいよ ゼータが怒ると怖いからね
subtitles.english: Okay, because Zeta's scary when she's angry.

subtitles.original: こわいよー
subtitles.english: Scary!

subtitles.original: もういいや ゼータがカメラも独り占めしちゃダメっていうのは… うーん、しょうがない
subtitles.english: Fine, if we can't hog the camera from Zeta... Hmm, I guess it can't be helped.

subtitles.original: ファンのみんなと遊ぼう！
subtitles.english: Let's play with the fans!

subtitles.original: さっきみんなからも大きな声もらったわけだし 今度はこっちがみんなに大きな声を出したいっす！
subtitles.english: Everyone gave us their loud voices earlier, so now it's our turn to give a loud voice to everyone!

subtitles.original: はいはいはい
subtitles.english: Yes yes yes.

subtitles.original: そうっすよ、カエラの配信時間ほど長くはならないから安心して
subtitles.english: That's right, it won't be as long as Kaela's stream time so don't worry.

subtitles.original: そう！ みんなにじゃなく、みんなとね
subtitles.english: Right! Not *at* everyone, but *with* everyone.

subtitles.original: そうそう！ そういうことっす！
subtitles.english: Yeah! That's what I mean!

subtitles.original: だってこれから歌わなきゃいけないから まず声を温存しなきゃでしょ？
subtitles.english: Because we have to sing after this, we need to save our voices first, right?

subtitles.original: そうっすよ、そんなにカエラの配信時間ほど長くはならないから安心して
subtitles.english: That's right, it won't be as long as Kaela's stream time so don't worry.

subtitles.original: まあいい 大声出していいから好きにして
subtitles.english: Well fine, you can shout as much as you want.

subtitles.original: みんな準備はいいかな？
subtitles.english: Everyone, are you ready?

subtitles.original: 準備出来てる？
subtitles.english: Are you ready?

subtitles.original: もう出来てるみたいっすね！ じゃあここから！
subtitles.english: Seems like you're already ready! Then from here!

subtitles.original: 一緒に「BOKOBOKOBO！」って叫ぼう！ よろしくいくよ！
subtitles.english: Let's shout "BOKOBOKOBO" together! Here we go!

subtitles.original: いち、に、さん！
subtitles.english: One, two, three!

subtitles.original: BOKOBOKOBO！
subtitles.english: BOKOBOKOBO!

subtitles.original: いいわねいいわね！次はゼータ！
subtitles.english: Good, good! Next is Zeta!

subtitles.original: はいはいはいはい！
subtitles.english: Yes yes yes yes!

subtitles.original: 「ミッションスタート」って言ったら一緒に「スタート」って言ってわね！
subtitles.english: When I say "Mission Start", say "Start" together!

subtitles.original: いいかな？ アアア！ ミッション…
subtitles.english: Ready? Ahhh! Mission...

subtitles.original: スタート！
subtitles.english: Start!

subtitles.original: 次はカエラ！
subtitles.english: Next is Kaela!

subtitles.original: よしよしよしよし！ きてみんもそしてholoh3roも
subtitles.english: Good good good good! To the audience and holoh3ro too.

subtitles.original: 「holoh3ro！」って言ったら「HU-HA！」で返してね！ 簡単でしょ？
subtitles.english: When I say "holoh3ro!", respond with "HU-HA!"! Easy, right?

subtitles.original: さあさあさあ！
subtitles.english: Come on, come on, come on!

subtitles.original: 準備はいい？ holoh3ro！
subtitles.english: Are you ready? holoh3ro!

subtitles.original: HU-HA！
subtitles.english: HU-HA!

subtitles.original: いいわねいいわね！
subtitles.english: Good, good!

subtitles.original: いいわね ついに３期生は息ぴったり
subtitles.english: Nice, finally Gen 3 is in perfect sync.

subtitles.original: そうね まだまだ元気が有り余りそうね
subtitles.english: Yeah, looks like there's still plenty of energy left.

subtitles.original: だって、今日の一曲目だもん でももうすごく伝わってくるんだもん
subtitles.english: After all, it's the first song of the day. But it's already coming through so much.

subtitles.original: みんな、まさか私達の一曲目が「100%」だなんて思ってた？
subtitles.english: Everyone, did you ever think our first song would be "100%"?

subtitles.original: 思うわけないよな 私もびっくりした
subtitles.english: No way we'd think that. I was surprised too.

subtitles.original: ホシノヴァ気分でライブ開始だなんて！ すごいよね？
subtitles.english: Starting the live in Hoshinova mood! Amazing, isn't it?

subtitles.original: やばい！
subtitles.english: Crazy!

subtitles.original: かっこいいっすね、しかもさっきゼータと歌った… いや違う
subtitles.english: It's cool, and singing with Zeta earlier... No wait.

subtitles.original: ゼータとか？
subtitles.english: Zeta or something?

subtitles.original: ゼータとカエラが歌った時はもう本家の「100%」みたいっす
subtitles.english: When Zeta and Kaela sang, it was just like the original "100%".

subtitles.original: マジかっこよすぎなんだけど なんか、うーうー！ってなってきて！
subtitles.english: It was seriously too cool, I was like "Ugh! Ugh!".

subtitles.original: あんなにかっこいい歌を歌ったことあるのかな？
subtitles.english: I wonder if I've ever sung such a cool song before?

subtitles.original: かっこつけてんの？
subtitles.english: Are you trying to look cool?

subtitles.original: そう、かっこつけてる
subtitles.english: Yeah, acting cool.

subtitles.original: 本物のかっこつけ だってムーナの曲がかっこいいもん
subtitles.english: Real cool. Because Moona's song is cool.

subtitles.original: だってゼータがいつもスタイリッシュとかジャズっぽい曲ばっかだしね？
subtitles.english: Because Zeta usually sings stylish or jazzy songs, right?

subtitles.original: だからさっき「100%」を歌った時 めっちゃ雰囲気が違う
subtitles.english: So when singing "100%" earlier, the atmosphere was totally different.

subtitles.original: しかもカエラのラップも！
subtitles.english: And Kaela's rap too!

subtitles.original: なんかこう… ダダダダダダダダダダダダ！
subtitles.english: It was like... dadadadadadadadada!

subtitles.original: とにかくかっこよかった！ すごいわ！
subtitles.english: Anyway, it was cool! Amazing!

subtitles.original: でも、それだけじゃないよ！ 次の曲が「NEW[zom]BIE!!」でした！
subtitles.english: But that's not all! The next song was "NEW[zom]BIE!!"!

subtitles.original: これだれの曲かわかるよね？
subtitles.english: You know whose song this is, right?

subtitles.original: もちろんらよ うちの先輩だ
subtitles.english: Of course, it's our senpai.

subtitles.original: さっきもあれさ… holoroのパフォーマンスもめっちゃかっこよかったよ まるでゲームの中にいるみたいだった
subtitles.english: Earlier that too... holoro's performance was also very cool, it was like being in a game.

subtitles.original: そうっすわ！ しかもバックダンサーもいたし
subtitles.english: That's right! And there were back dancers too.

subtitles.original: かっこよかったっね！
subtitles.english: It was cool, wasn't it!

subtitles.original: かっこいい！
subtitles.english: Cool!

subtitles.original: 他になんかあったかな？ レーザーも花火も！あと…
subtitles.english: Was there anything else? Lasers and fireworks too! And...

subtitles.original: すごいギミックがたくさんあったっすわ！
subtitles.english: There were lots of amazing gimmicks!

subtitles.original: あのバックダンサーたち あたしのソロライブに雇うっす
subtitles.english: I'll hire those back dancers for my solo live.

subtitles.original: おっと、もうソロライブの話？
subtitles.english: Oops, talking about a solo live already?

subtitles.original: まあ言霊も祈りってやつ
subtitles.english: Well, words have power.

subtitles.original: でもこのライブはまだ終わらないよ！ まだまだ！
subtitles.english: But this live isn't over yet! Still more!

subtitles.original: でも…さっき何の歌を歌ったか知ってる？
subtitles.english: Bu-but... do you know what song we sang earlier?

subtitles.original: もちろんらよ 私の新しい曲だから 「dahlah.」
subtitles.english: Of course, because it's my new song. "dahlah."

subtitles.original: そうっすね まあいいや
subtitles.english: Right. Oh well.

subtitles.original: まあいい
subtitles.english: Oh well.

subtitles.original: いやいや！ タイトルは「dahlah.」だよ！ 「dahlah.」！
subtitles.english: No no! The title is "dahlah."! "dahlah."!

subtitles.original: おぉなるほど
subtitles.english: Oh I see.

subtitles.original: 「dahlah.」だったか… まぁわざとだったけど 「dahlah.」だったか、先に言ってよ！
subtitles.english: So it was "dahlah."... Well, we were doing it on purpose, but so it was "dahlah.", you should've said so!

subtitles.original: だっていつもそれ言ってるじゃん 本当にもういいやって思ってた
subtitles.english: Because you're always saying that. I thought you were really fed up.

subtitles.original: それ言って帰ると思ってた
subtitles.english: I thought you'd say that and go home.

subtitles.original: いやいや、かわいそうだから
subtitles.english: No no, that would be sad.

subtitles.original: じゃあ「dahlah」ってどういう意味？
subtitles.english: So what does "dahlah" mean?

subtitles.original: 人生はしょうがないって意味
subtitles.english: It means "it can't be helped" in life.

subtitles.original: 人生は重いからまあいいやって言えばいいだけ
subtitles.english: Life is heavy, so just say "oh well".

subtitles.original: その後人生を続けようって意味
subtitles.english: It means "let's continue life after that".

subtitles.original: そうっすね、大人になったらわ
subtitles.english: That's right, once you become an adult.
